allow: Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh project view 4 --owner yexiyue --format json)
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "type:bug" --color "D73A4A" --description "Bug 修复")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "type:chore" --color "0E8A16" --description "维护、重构、工具链")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "type:spike" --color "D4C5F9" --description "技术调研（限时）")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "priority:critical" --color "B60205" --description "必须立即修复")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "priority:high" --color "D93F0B" --description "下个 Sprint 必须完成")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "priority:medium" --color "FBCA04" --description "尽快完成")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "priority:low" --color "C2E0C6" --description "有空再做")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "size:xs" --color "EDEDED" --description "< 1 小时")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "size:s" --color "D4C5F9" --description "1-4 小时")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "size:m" --color "BFD4F2" --description "4-8 小时")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "size:xl" --color "D93F0B" --description "> 2 天（应拆分）")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "status:ready" --color "0E8A16" --description "已细化，可进入 Sprint")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "status:review" --color "D4C5F9" --description "等待 Review")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh label create "layer:L0" --color "0E8A16" --description "无依赖，可立即开始")
Bash(GH_PAGER=cat gh project field-list 4 --owner yexiyue --format json)
Bash(gh issue create --title 'navigation: Drawer + Tab 混合导航骨架' --label type:feature,priority:critical,size:l,layer:L1,mvp --milestone v0.1.0 --body ':*)

hooks.command: bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^src/" | head -1); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo "[dev-workflow] 检测到 src/ 下有代码变更，请运行 /simplify 检查代码质量"; fi'
